reason: This is a general philosophical tweet about hearts/love in Arabic, with no extremist content. It says 'There are hearts that don't know how to hate no matter how much you wrong them, and hearts that don't know how to love no matter what you do for them.'
original_post: 💕 هناك قلوب لا تعرف ان تكره مهما ظلمتها او قسيت عليها وهناك قلوب لا تعرف ان تحب مهما فعلت من اجلها
